name: Broiled Tomatoes with Feta Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Reheat the broiler.
2. Overlap the tomatoes in a large baking dish.
3. Crumble the cheese over them, add half the marjoram and drizzle oil over the top.
4. Place the dish a few inches below the heat source and broil until the cheese is melted and starting to color, about 7 minutes.
5. Remove from the broiler, drizzle a little more oil over the top, add the rest of the marjoram, season with pepper, and serve.
